sizing_rule.note: Portfolio position weights (Xi) determined by inverse scaling of individual security standard deviations (Si) and covariances (COVi,j = Ri,j × Si × Sj). Higher volatility securities receive smaller allocations; lower volatility securities receive larger allocations. This is Modern Portfolio Theory variance minimization weighting.

source_rule_text: Position sizing for multi-security portfolios should be weighted (Xi) based on the standard deviation and covariance of expected returns between securities to optimize portfolio variance.
